# Subscription Sample

| Resource | `osubsubscription/Subscription` |

```yaml
#
# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
# Licensed under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 as shown at http://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl.
#

#
# Subscription is query-backed and observe-only in this rollout.
# Provide compartmentId plus exactly one of planNumber, subscriptionId,
# or buyerEmail for a unique reread query. The top-level summary does
# not expose a tracked OCI identity, so Kubernetes delete is local-only.
# If your tenancy requires request-scoped access headers, also set
# xOneGatewaySubscriptionId and/or xOneOriginRegion.
#
apiVersion: osubsubscription.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: Subscription
metadata:
  name: subscription-sample
spec:
  compartmentId: ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  subscriptionId: example-line-subscription-id
  isCommitInfoRequired: true
  xOneOriginRegion: us-phoenix-1
```
